description: and over Bool values must match the equivalent if expression.

description: or over Bool values must match the equivalent if expression.
name: logic_or_matches_if_bool

description: Double logical negation must preserve a generated Bool expression.

name: logic_demorgan_or_bool

description: Variadic and must behave like nested binary and.
name: logic_and_variadic_associates

description: Variadic or must behave like nested binary or.
name: logic_or_variadic_associates

description: A False operand must force variadic and to False.
name: logic_and_absorbs_false

description: A True operand must force variadic or to True.
name: logic_or_absorbs_true

description: True must be the identity element for Bool and.
name: logic_and_identity_true

description: False must be the identity element for Bool or.
name: logic_or_identity_false

description: Logical not must coerce generated Int expressions by zero-ness.

description: Logical and must coerce an Int operand and preserve True identity.

name: logic_int_or_false_is_nonzero

description: Integer zero must coerce to False in and.
name: logic_int_and_zero_forces_false

description: Integer one must coerce to True in or.
name: logic_int_or_one_forces_true

description: if must use the same Int-to-Bool coercion as explicit nonzero comparison.
name: logic_int_if_condition_matches_not_zero

description: Direct variadic + dispatch must regroup like nested additions.
name: arith_direct_add_variadic_regroups_four

description: Direct variadic - dispatch must behave as a left fold.
name: arith_direct_sub_variadic_left_fold

description: Direct variadic * dispatch must regroup like nested multiplications.
name: arith_direct_mul_variadic_regroups_four

description: Variadic + and - must compose correctly across three operands.
name: arith_direct_add_sub_inverse_variadic

description: Direct * must distribute over a variadic + expression.
name: arith_direct_mul_distributes_over_variadic_add

description: Stable helper calls and direct arithmetic dispatch must agree when nested.
name: arith_direct_nested_helper_and_builtin_agree

description: Percent modulo dispatch must compute integer remainder for constants.
name: arith_mod_constant_percent

description: Named mod dispatch must compute the same integer remainder as percent modulo.
name: arith_mod_constant_named_mod

description: Integer division dispatch must compute exact integer quotients.
name: arith_div_constant_exact

description: Division by a nonzero constant must roundtrip a prior multiplication by a multiple.
name: arith_div_mul_roundtrip_constant

description: Modulo should remain stable when a generated expression cancels to zero.
name: arith_mod_after_equal_subtraction

description: Bitwise and with zero must clear every bit.
name: bitwise_and_zero_absorbs

description: Bitwise or with zero must preserve the operand.
name: bitwise_or_zero_identity

description: Bitwise xor with zero must preserve the operand.
name: bitwise_xor_zero_identity

description: Bitwise xor of a value with itself must be zero.
name: bitwise_xor_self_zero

description: Bitwise and must be idempotent.
name: bitwise_and_idempotent

description: Bitwise or must be idempotent.
name: bitwise_or_idempotent

description: Double bitwise not must preserve the operand.
name: bitwise_not_involution

description: Left shift by zero must preserve the operand.
name: bitwise_shift_left_zero_identity

description: Arithmetic right shift by zero must preserve the operand.
name: bitwise_shift_right_zero_identity

name: bitwise_absorption_and_over_or

name: bitwise_absorption_or_over_and

description: Bitwise xor must be commutative.
name: bitwise_xor_commutative

name: bitwise_and_commutative

description: Bitwise or must be commutative.
name: bitwise_or_commutative

description: Variadic equality must accept three equal generated Int expressions.
name: compare_variadic_equal_three

description: Variadic not-equal must accept a generated successor chain.

name: compare_variadic_gt_predecessor_chain

description: Variadic >= must allow equality before a smaller predecessor.

name: control_unless_false_mutates

description: unless True must skip its body.

description: while must re-evaluate its condition and mutate the loop variable until exit.

description: while with nested begin must preserve sequential mutations inside the loop body.

description: while False must perform zero iterations and preserve a with-bound value.

name: control_for_range_form_compiles_without_value_change
